mapper.insert: INSERT INTO interview_session (application_case_id, mode, started_at, total_score, report, source_snapshot) VALUES (#{applicationCaseId}, #{mode}, #{startedAt}, #{totalScore}, #{report}, #{sourceSnapshot})
mapper.select: SELECT s.*, COALESCE(progress.total_questions, 0) AS total_questions, COALESCE(progress.answered_questions, 0) AS answered_questions, (COALESCE(progress.total_questions, 0) > 0 AND COALESCE(progress.answered_questions, 0) = COALESCE(progress.total_questions, 0)) AS finished, (SELECT ROUND(AVG(a.score)) FROM interview_answer a JOIN interview_question q ON q.id = a.question_id WHERE q.interview_session_id = s.id AND q.deleted_at IS NULL AND a.submission_status = 'COMPLETED' AND a.score IS NOT NULL) AS avg_answer_score, (SELECT ROUND(AVG(m.score)) FROM interview_media_analysis m WHERE m.interview_session_id = s.id AND m.kind = 'VOICE') AS avg_voice_score FROM interview_session s JOIN application_case ac ON ac.id = s.application_case_id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT q.interview_session_id, COUNT(DISTINCT q.id) AS total_questions, COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN a.id IS NOT NULL THEN q.id END) AS answered_questions FROM interview_question q LEFT JOIN interview_answer a ON a.question_id = q.id AND a.submission_status = 'COMPLETED' WHERE q.deleted_at IS NULL GROUP BY q.interview_session_id ) progress ON progress.interview_session_id = s.id WHERE ac.user_id = #{userId} AND ac.deleted_at IS NULL AND s.deleted_at IS NULL ORDER BY COALESCE(s.last_resumed_at, s.created_at) DESC, s.id DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM interview_session s JOIN application_case ac ON ac.id = s.application_case_id WHERE ac.user_id = #{userId} AND ac.deleted_at IS NULL AND s.deleted_at IS NULL
mapper.update: UPDATE interview_session s JOIN application_case ac ON ac.id = s.application_case_id SET s.deleted_at = NOW() WHERE s.id = #{id} AND ac.user_id = #{userId} AND ac.deleted_at IS NULL AND s.deleted_at IS NULL

UPDATE interview_session s JOIN application_case ac ON ac.id = s.application_case_id SET s.last_resumed_at = NOW() WHERE s.id = #{id} AND ac.user_id = #{userId} AND ac.deleted_at IS NULL AND s.deleted_at IS NULL
mapper.select: SELECT s.* FROM interview_session s JOIN application_case ac ON ac.id = s.application_case_id WHERE s.id = #{id} AND ac.user_id = #{userId} AND ac.deleted_at IS NULL AND s.deleted_at IS NULL

SELECT s.* FROM interview_session s JOIN application_case ac ON ac.id = s.application_case_id WHERE s.id = #{id} AND ac.user_id = #{userId} AND ac.deleted_at IS NULL AND s.deleted_at IS NULL FOR UPDATE
mapper.update: UPDATE interview_session SET total_score = NULL, report = NULL, ended_at = NULL WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted_at IS NULL AND (total_score IS NOT NULL OR report IS NOT NULL OR ended_at IS NOT NULL)
UPDATE interview_training_sample SET deleted_at = NOW() WHERE interview_session_id = #{sessionId} AND deleted_at IS NULL
mapper.select: SELECT upv.id AS profile_version_id, COALESCE(upv.version_no, up.version_no) AS profile_version_no, COALESCE(upv.desired_job, up.desired_job) AS desired_job, COALESCE(upv.education, up.education) AS education, COALESCE(upv.career, up.career) AS career, COALESCE(upv.projects, up.projects) AS projects, COALESCE(upv.skills, up.skills) AS skills, COALESCE(upv.certificates, up.certificates) AS certificates, COALESCE(upv.portfolio_links, up.portfolio_links) AS portfolio_links, COALESCE(upv.resume_text, up.resume_text) AS resume_text, COALESCE(upv.self_intro, up.self_intro) AS self_intro, ja.id AS job_analysis_id, ja.required_skills, ja.preferred_skills, ja.duties, ja.qualifications, ja.summary AS job_summary, ca.id AS company_analysis_id, ca.company_summary, ca.recent_issues, ca.interview_points, fa.id AS fit_analysis_id, fa.fit_score, fa.matched_skills, fa.missing_skills, fa.gap_recommendations, fa.strategy_actions, fa.model AS fit_model, fa.prompt_version AS fit_prompt_version, fa.created_at AS fit_created_at FROM application_case ac LEFT JOIN user_profile up ON up.user_id = ac.user_id AND up.deleted_at IS NULL LEFT JOIN user_profile_version upv ON upv.id = ( SELECT latest_profile.id FROM user_profile_version latest_profile WHERE latest_profile.user_id = ac.user_id AND latest_profile.deleted_at IS NULL ORDER BY latest_profile.version_no DESC, latest_profile.id DESC LIMIT 1 ) LEFT JOIN job_analysis ja ON ja.id = ( SELECT MAX(latest_job.id) FROM job_analysis latest_job WHERE latest_job.application_case_id = ac.id ) LEFT JOIN company_analysis ca ON ca.id = ( SELECT MAX(latest_company.id) FROM company_analysis latest_company WHERE latest_company.application_case_id = ac.id ) LEFT JOIN fit_analysis fa ON fa.id = ( SELECT MAX(latest_fit.id) FROM fit_analysis latest_fit WHERE latest_fit.application_case_id = ac.id AND latest_fit.status = 'SUCCESS' ) WHERE ac.id = #{applicationCaseId} AND ac.user_id = #{userId} AND ac.deleted_at IS NULL
SELECT total_score FROM interview_session WHERE application_case_id = #{applicationCaseId} AND total_score IS NOT NULL AND deleted_at IS NULL AND id <> #{excludeSessionId} ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO interview_question (interview_session_id, parent_question_id, question, question_type, sort_order) VALUES (#{interviewSessionId}, #{parentQuestionId}, #{question}, #{questionType}, #{sortOrder})
mapper.select: SELECT MAX(sort_order) FROM interview_question WHERE interview_session_id = #{sessionId} AND deleted_at IS NULL
mapper.update: UPDATE interview_question SET deleted_at = NOW() WHERE interview_session_id = #{sessionId} AND deleted_at IS NULL
mapper.select: SELECT q.* FROM interview_question q LEFT JOIN interview_question p ON p.id = q.parent_question_id WHERE q.interview_session_id = #{sessionId} AND q.deleted_at IS NULL ORDER BY COALESCE(p.sort_order, q.sort_order), (q.parent_question_id IS NOT NULL), q.sort_order, q.id
mapper.insert: INSERT IGNORE INTO interview_ai_operation (user_id, feature_type, target_id, operation_key) VALUES (#{userId}, #{featureType}, #{targetId}, #{operationKey})
mapper.select: SELECT q.* FROM interview_question q JOIN interview_session s ON s.id = q.interview_session_id JOIN application_case ac ON ac.id = s.application_case_id WHERE q.id = #{id} AND q.deleted_at IS NULL AND ac.user_id = #{userId} AND ac.deleted_at IS NULL AND s.deleted_at IS NULL

SELECT q.* FROM interview_question q JOIN interview_session s ON s.id = q.interview_session_id JOIN application_case ac ON ac.id = s.application_case_id WHERE q.id = #{id} AND q.deleted_at IS NULL AND ac.user_id = #{userId} AND ac.deleted_at IS NULL AND s.deleted_at IS NULL FOR UPDATE

SELECT CASE WHEN EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM interview_answer a JOIN interview_question q ON q.id = a.question_id WHERE q.interview_session_id = #{sessionId} AND q.deleted_at IS NULL ) OR EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM file_asset f JOIN interview_answer a ON a.id = f.ref_id JOIN interview_question q ON q.id = a.question_id WHERE f.ref_type = 'INTERVIEW_ANSWER' AND q.interview_session_id = #{sessionId} AND q.deleted_at IS NULL ) OR EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM interview_media_analysis m WHERE m.interview_session_id = #{sessionId} ) OR EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM interview_agent_step step WHERE step.interview_session_id = #{sessionId} ) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO interview_answer (question_id, client_submission_id, submission_status, answer_text, audio_url, video_url, score, feedback, improved_answer) VALUES (#{questionId}, #{clientSubmissionId}, 'COMPLETED', #{answerText}, #{audioUrl}, #{videoUrl}, #{score}, #{feedback}, #{improvedAnswer})
INSERT IGNORE INTO interview_answer (question_id, client_submission_id, submission_status) VALUES (#{questionId}, #{clientSubmissionId}, 'PENDING')
mapper.update: UPDATE interview_answer a JOIN interview_question q ON q.id = a.question_id JOIN interview_session s ON s.id = q.interview_session_id JOIN application_case ac ON ac.id = s.application_case_id SET a.answer_text = #{answerText}, a.audio_url = #{audioUrl}, a.video_url = #{videoUrl}, a.score = #{score}, a.feedback = #{feedback}, a.improved_answer = #{improvedAnswer}, a.submission_status = 'COMPLETED' WHERE a.id = #{id} AND a.submission_status = 'PENDING' AND s.deleted_at IS NULL AND ac.deleted_at IS NULL
mapper.select: SELECT a.* FROM interview_answer a JOIN interview_question q ON q.id = a.question_id WHERE q.interview_session_id = #{sessionId} AND q.deleted_at IS NULL AND a.submission_status = 'COMPLETED' ORDER BY q.sort_order, a.id
SELECT * FROM interview_answer WHERE question_id = #{questionId} AND submission_status = 'COMPLETED' ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT a.* FROM interview_answer a JOIN interview_question q ON q.id = a.question_id JOIN interview_session s ON s.id = q.interview_session_id JOIN application_case ac ON ac.id = s.application_case_id WHERE a.id = #{id} AND q.deleted_at IS NULL AND ac.user_id = #{userId} AND ac.deleted_at IS NULL AND s.deleted_at IS NULL AND a.submission_status = 'COMPLETED'
mapper.update: UPDATE interview_answer SET audio_url = NULL WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE interview_answer SET video_url = NULL WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ai_usage_log (user_id, application_case_id, feature_type, status, model, input_tokens, output_tokens, token_usage, credit_used, error_message) VALUES (#{userId}, #{applicationCaseId}, #{featureType}, #{status}, #{model}, #{inputTokens}, #{outputTokens}, #{tokenUsage}, #{creditUsed}, #{errorMessage})

INSERT INTO interview_agent_step (interview_session_id, question_id, step_no, agent, action, status, summary, detail, elapsed_ms) VALUES (#{interviewSessionId}, #{questionId}, #{stepNo}, #{agent}, #{action}, #{status}, #{summary}, #{detail}, #{elapsedMs})
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM interview_agent_step WHERE interview_session_id = #{sessionId} ORDER BY id
